content_body: We had such a great time time in this beautiful cabin in Blue Ridge. We just got married on 7/27, and this was where we celebrated our honeymoon. It is such a cozy, beautiful, clean, comfy cabin, and we want to come back and bring our precious children. They will love it here. J.J's in Ellijay was an excellent place to eat, as was the Saw Mill (home cooking) in Blairsville. The pretzels at the Black Bear Bier Garten in Blue Ridge were amazing, as well as the Sweet Shoppe in downtown Blue Ridge. We enjoyed lots of just down-time, just hanging out with each other in our cabin as well. Great memories! Special Memories!
title: Honeymoon In The North Georgia Mountains
